recommended_actions.description: s1874 (E#224) produced incomplete session note ('Let me move to Phase 1 and then Phase 2 engagement') breaking the 50-session zero-formulaic streak. Investigate whether this was a truncation/cost-cap issue or genuine quality failure. If cost-cap, the e-cost-cap.mjs threshold may need adjustment for sessions that haven't completed note generation.

Hook count discrepancy: BRIEFING.md says 61 hooks (pending deletions to 54), but actual directory listing shows 64 (32 pre + 32 post). Either BRIEFING count is outdated or hooks were added without updating the count. BRIEFING.md should be updated to reflect actual count.
